en: Two of these words are pronounced the same, were, where, were, three, two, one.
ko: 이 중 두 단어의 발음이 같아. were, where

en: The correct answer is were and were are pronounced the same.
ko: 셋, 둘, 하나. 정답은 were와 were의 발음이

en: They're pronounced were, were, and this word is pronounced where, where.
Say it with me, were going where they were, were going where they were.
ko: where. 나를 따라 해봐. Were going where they were. Were
going where they were. 더 많은 영어 레슨을 위해 구독해줘
